domains.name: Bootstrapping a Google Cloud organization for DevOps

questions.text: Per official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides, which source should you use when studying Bootstrapping a Google Cloud organization for DevOps for Google Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer?
questions.explanation: Use PCDO exam guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: According to 'PCDO exam guide', what is a documented best practice for Bootstrapping a Google Cloud organization for DevOps?
